title: relay ws: SET_NICKNAME has no rate limit and no subscription check; O(N) broadcast amplification
description: In relay/src/ws.rs, the SET_NICKNAME handler (around line 739) has no rate limit and no subscription guard. It calls state.broadcast(None, notif) which pushes a USER_NICKNAME notification to every connected client. An unsubscribed, unauthenticated-by-subscription client can call SET_NICKNAME in a tight loop, generating O(N) mpsc pushes per call where N = connected clients. The handler is not in the rate_limit check. This lets a single free (unsubscribed) connection exhaust other clients' receive buffers. Fix: add a check_rate_limit() call, and optionally a subscription check, to SET_NICKNAME before the broadcast.
